_comment: Interface only — NO secret values here. Set secrets at deploy time (ACA secret refs). Secret NAMES come from docs/migration/ENV_MATRIX.md.

value._comment: name -> value at deploy; e.g. SUPABASE_URL, SUPABASE_SERVICE_ROLE_KEY, SUPABASE_JWT_SECRET, CONNECTION_STRING, CONNECTION_STRING_DIRECT, FASHN_API_KEY, R2_ACCESS_KEY_ID, R2_SECRET_ACCESS_KEY, OPENAI_API_KEY, ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, REVENUECAT_WEBHOOK_AUTH, FCM_CREDENTIALS_JSON, SENTRY_DSN — see ENV_MATRIX.md
